channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  2. Swedish legaltech Legora hits $5 billion valuation as investors pile money into European AI startups  CNBC
  3. Legal AI startup Legora raises $550 million to speed up US expansion  Yahoo Finance
  4. Why Airtree is betting on the end of the junior law firm associate  AFR
  5. AI legal giant Legora lands its first acquisition, and the great legal-tech rollup continues  Business Insider

item.title: Trump’s divisive FDA vaccine regulator self-destructs, will exit agency (again) - Ars Technica
item.description:
1. Trump’s divisive FDA vaccine regulator self-destructs, will exit agency (again)  Ars Technica
  2. Vinay Prasad, key Makary ally and a focus of controversy at the FDA, is leaving the agency  statnews.com
  3. FDA vaccine head will step down in April after string of controversial decisions  CNBC
  4. Biotech Stocks Rally on Departure of Polarizing FDA Official  WSJ
  5. Prasad out at FDA after a number of public fights with drugmakers  CIDRAP

item.title: Ex-Meta AI chief Yann LeCun's AMI raises $1.03 billion for alternative AI approach - Reuters
item.description:
1. Ex-Meta AI chief Yann LeCun's AMI raises $1.03 billion for alternative AI approach  Reuters
  2. Yann LeCun Raises $1 Billion to Build AI That Understands the Physical World  WIRED
  3. Yann LeCun’s AMI Labs raises $1.03B to build world models  TechCrunch
  4. French AI startup AMI raises $1B to develop 'universal intelligent systems'  France 24
  5. Former Meta A.I. Chief’s Start-Up Is Valued at $3.5 Billion - The New York Times  The New York Times
